sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 22:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 22:1
items.html: When the lights entered the vessels of the second expansion, they came by way of Matei [expanding] and not Matei. In the beginning, they all came to Keter. After they are not Matei in Keter, they came in Hochma. After they are not Matei in Hochma, they came in Bina, etc., similarly. Thus, the lights made ten exits and ten entries until the light reached Malchut. (Item 22)
